## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GrowthX's role in Surge AI's marketing efforts and clarify responsibilities between teams.](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is managing broad marketing initiatives, including website revamp, social media strategy, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Approval processes and content generation responsibilities need further clarification between GrowthX and Surge AI teams](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Current focus is on building awareness and authority in post-training AI, rather than direct lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Both teams agree on the need for a more structured content strategy aligned with Surge AI's key pillars](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Scope of Work

  - [Managing broad marketing initiatives for Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Developing positioning and messaging, culminating in new website design](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Handling social media strategy and post creation (with approval from Surge team)](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Organizing events and exploring speaking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Website development moving from Webflow to Next.js with Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### Content Creation and Approval Process

  - [GrowthX drafts social media posts for company profiles](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Surge team (currently Edwin) provides final approval](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Need to streamline approval process to avoid bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Proposal to differentiate between company posts (easier approval) and Edwin's personal posts (requiring his input)](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### Metrics and Goals

  - [Primary focus on awareness rather than direct lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Tracking impressions across various content types (videos, website, socials)](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Considering brand surveys or share of voice measurements in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Qualitative assessment of "buzz" and positive mentions in the industry](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Podcast and Content Amplification

  - [GrowthX helps with podcast preparation and editing suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [Need for a more comprehensive strategy to amplify podcast content over time](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Discussion on creating multiple social media posts and clips from a single podcast](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

### Blog Post Strategy

  - [Current blog posts not fully aligned with Surge AI's pillar goals](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Need for a coherent content strategy tying individual posts to broader themes](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage Surge AI's unique expertise in benchmarks and technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

### Upcoming Events

  - [Two events in planning: a smaller, exclusive one and a larger 50-person event](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Need for strategic thinking on attendee mix and event objectives](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Current outreach showing promising response rates (over 10% positive responses)](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2147.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mason to discuss with Edwin about streamlining social media approval process](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a document outlining guidelines for social media posting frequency and content types](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [Jason to develop a more comprehensive content strategy aligned with Surge AI's key pillars](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more visibility into their ongoing marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Surge team (Mason/Sullivan) to share more context about internal content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement Assembly tool for post approvals; Surge team to provide feedback on usability](https://fathom.video/share/Su8vhUPx-BYySp5yMMqQH3x5eYk3ZD1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
